#8-JUDGE MARTIN SUITS; L. NAJERA, CSR: P. LEE, CLERK JACQUELINE WOODS, ATTY APPEARING FOR PLT DARRYL MERCER, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, ALL PRESENT, JURORS & ALTERNATE JUROR SWORN. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD AS A JUDGMENT FOR PLT PURS STIPULATION.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CAMBRIDGE HOTEL, LTD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCER, DARRYL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS ST, #403 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-02-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PARTIES TO BEAR OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ALL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSITS. PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE BACK RENTS & DAMAGES.
